creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I was just wondering if there has been any work done on this in the last year. Boot splash hasn't worked since the 10.x series, and 12.0-RELEASE is due out soon. I noticed that a lot of vt(4) work is planned for the 13-CURRENT series (according to bug 231027). Is it possible this bug could get some renewed attention along with the other vt work for 13?
